commit.subject: LU-17000 lnet: Fix Data race when accessing lp_state (1)
commit.message:
LU-17000 lnet: Fix Data race when accessing lp_state (1)

Fix Data race when accessing lp_state. lp_state in
other places in the code is accessed within lp_lock.

CoverityID: 404759 ("Data race condition")
Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-lnet
Signed-off-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Change-Id: I7b453e286c51ab39cab5462b5962bd3daa856d85
